TextENGNew: The dazzling sunlight had bled into a deep crimson, staining everything in hues of red.
A cool breeze occasionally cut through the lukewarm, stiflingly humid air of the shrine grounds. The familiar grounds felt strangely vast... undoubtedly a reflection of the emptiness in my own heart.
At the main shrine building stood myself, hands cuffed in front, and Takano. ...And nine armed soldiers with guns at the ready, positioned as if waiting for someone to ascend the stone steps.
Beyond them, I could sense more presences -- behind the assembly hall, in the thicket. ...A rear guard, most likely, but how many were out there was anyone's guess.

I had hoped they might let their guard down somewhat, given that their opponent was a child... but that hope proved naive. Takano had marshaled a flawless defensive formation as she calmly waited for the appointed time.
Without thinking, I murmured my best friend's name. Takano, listening keenly from beside me, let out a repulsive chuckle and swept her hair back before speaking.
``--So, which do you think it will be?@k@vS14/09/220900031. Will they come?@k@vS14/09/220900032. Or won't they?``
``I have no... obligation to answer that.``

``Hee hee...@k@vS14/09/220900034. Still putting on a brave face -- you're a resilient one.@k@vS14/09/220900035. Even adults would be terrified in a hostage situation like this, so why not just answer honestly?``

``Hmph.@k@vS14/04/220400153. If you wish me to speak honestly...@k@vS14/04/220400154. ...that outfit of yours is stifling just to look at.@k@vS14/04/220400155. Could you not wear something more befitting the summer?``
``Oh dear, how unfortunate.@k@vS14/09/220900037. I'm rather fond of this outfit, though... hee hee hee!``
Takano seemed to be teasing me as she said that, then shrugged her shoulders and laughed.
...Honestly, Takano really isn't that bad when she's like this.
Because somehow I feel she has some emotional leeway like tolerance, unlike my mother and aunt who were prone to hysterics and found fault with everyone.
And it's strange, but even after being driven into this situation... I still can't fully bring myself to hate Takano.
Maybe she'd start laughing hysterically and say it was all just a joke... As impossible as that was, I couldn't help but think it for a moment.
...If Rika had heard that, she probably would've opened her eyes wide in shock.
``Satoko-chan... about me.``
As if she sensed the unease in my heart, Takano said that in a voice quiet enough that only I could hear, while keeping her gaze fixated on the shrine gate in front of us.

``You probably won't believe this, but...@k@vS14/09/220900040. I never felt any ill will toward you.@k@vS14/09/220900041. Considering your background, your circumstances... and even your illness, I can't say I was unsympathetic.``
``I admit that I treated you like a mere test subject, but...@k@vS14/09/220900043. deep down, I wanted it to lead to your treatment. I really did want you to be fully cured.``
``What's the point of bringing that up now?@k@vS14/04/220400157. I... already knew that.``
As far as that was concerned, I didn't have the best of personalities either. If someone I hated were to pat my head, I'd reject them and lash out.
But the people I wouldn't refuse head-pats from included the club members, Nii-nii, Nee-nee... and Takano. I had even dodged them from Irie.
``I've heard about Hinamizawa Syndrome from the coach and Rika.@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1036. ...I'm not exactly thrilled to have the disease.``
``But for all the time I spent around you, I can't say I didn't notice how seriously you were working to fight my illness.``

``Indeed.@k@vS14/09/220900045. As far as I'm concerned... researching Hinamizawa Syndrome is everything to me.@k@vS14/09/220900046. So... this might be a strange thing to say, but...@k@vS14/09/220900047. Even now, I do feel a nagging at my conscience for doing all this without managing to cure your illness.``

``Then why don't you stop this?@k@vS14/04/220400162. Even at this point, there may still be time.@k@vS14/04/220400163. Everything up until bringing me here...@k@vS14/04/220400164. Even keeping Nii-nii hidden away. None of that matters.``
``Yes, if that were possible.@k@vS14/09/220900049. ...However...``
Slowly,
Takano turned her eyes this way.
Her eyes... were dreadfully glistening, full of chilling hatred and bloodlust.
``The more I understand my weak self, unable to hate you... the more I realize there is someone I can never accept, or rather someone I want to disappear.``
``It disgusts me that she's living at the same time as me, breathing the same air.@k@vS14/09/220900052. ...I suppose you could call her a mortal enemy.``
``If she and I lived in different worlds, maybe my heart wouldn't have darkened so far...?``
``...Do you hate Rika that much?``
``Yes.@k@vS14/09/220900055. ...It's not the girl herself though, but rather the destiny centered around her... I can't help but hate it so much I want to tear it apart!``
``That dark, simmering emotion won't cease until I see her bloodsoaked entrails...!``
``And then I'll have my revenge for this horrible fate that betrayed me to despair!!``
``...@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1039.You've been through some terrible things, too...``
Takano shut her mouth and didn't say a word. And I didn't have anything more to say either.
I don't feel hatred... If I had to nail it down, I'd have to call it empathy.
I don't think it's abnormal. Some people would call it baffling... but I understand. I'm sure this woman is my future... Or rather, what my future would be if I were allowed to keep going.
She must've never had an opportunity to understand what it means to be loved.
And after being oppressed, neglected, and alienated from other people... feeling hostility towards others must've been the only way to keep herself going.
I... wasn't so different from her.
My mother didn't care much for me, so I considered everyone getting close to her an enemy and drove them away.
She got angry every time, but I was still glad I did it. Being hated is still better than being ignored.
And after losing my mother... the target moved to my brother. Rather than hate my aunt and uncle, I was glad my brother cared enough to protect me.
And then, after my brother was gone, it was the club members... and then, my uncle.
Even as I suffered that abuse, I thought it was the price of their caring, so I really was a hopeless case.
What if... what if I had never met Keiichi-san, Mion-san, Rena-san, and Rika? What would I have done?
And Nee-nee... Shion-san. What kind of path would I have gone down if she wasn't here?
...There was no need to imagine. The woman beside me was precisely that.
Miyo Takano. ...I'm sure she wanted someone to rely on.
I didn't know how much she considered the study of Hinamizawa Syndrome her reason for living, but I imagined she'd rather destroy it by herself than have it taken away.
And, I...
If I had to hand over my precious best friend and lose her forever... I'd rather give my own life.
That's right.
If anything's going to be torn apart, I'd rather it be my body.
I believed it. ...I still believe it. I still believe it right at this moment.
I believe that I can see what's important to me... and what choice I need to make.
But in fact... I'm starting to become aware.
I want to believe it, because I don't want to accept the truth.
This isn't really for Rika's sake. I just wanted things to be easier... I'm still a coward.
Because.
I'm no longer holding back. I'm ready to be killed. And yet, on the other hand... I'm still waiting for Rika to arrive.
And... somewhere in my heart, I have a desire for us to die together.
Even though I know that leaving me alone will save her life...
Those feelings were shameful and wretched.
That sobbing voice I tried to convince myself with... was so ridiculous and silly...
And those tears... those tears making a mess of my face...
Only the cry of the higurashi remained, annoyingly loud.
The red glow of the sunset slowly faded into nighttime.
They say evening begins the moment that light meets dark.
I'm sure... that girl will come.
When I climbed the stone steps leading to the shrine grounds, I noticed an unusual smell.
``...Just as I thought.``
It turned out to be the smell of heavy, oil-soaked camouflage clothing... as the Mountain Dogs surrounded me and Rika-chan all at once.
The imposing guns in their hands let out a dull glow in the light of the setting sun, and they made loud metallic racket as they held them at the ready.
The muzzles were all aimed at me and Rika-chan, and they weren't moving. ...Any misstep here would leave us studded with holes like a honeycomb.

I could see Takano and Satoko near the stairs to the main shrine. ...It seemed like Takano was listening to something over an earphone. Maybe she was receiving a report on the situation at the clinic.
``Right on time.@k@vS14/09/220900059. I like people who keep their promises.``
``Hee hee... Very well, let's continue.``
``Seems like you rate us so high.@k@vS14/01/220100261. Don't you feel embarrassed using this many soldiers against a couple of kids?``
``This is the minimum required to show proper courtesy@k@vS14/09/220900062. for the brave heroes who came all the way out here under these circumstances.@k@vS14/09/220900063. Hee hee hee...``
``I'm honored.@k@vS14/01/220100263. ...Well, I hope I never become the kind of adult who has to take hostages, no matter how cornered I feel.``

``...It's a laugh that these are the ``Mountain Dogs`` who were hand-selected from the Self-Defense Force.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1197. I think the ``Poodles`` would be a better name for the squad from now on.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1198. ...Hee hee!``
Rika-chan must've already been fully resolute, because she was smiling and glaring at Takano with a piercing look in her eyes.

The faces of the surrounding soldiers she called the Poodles quickly turned red, but Takano continued looking back with a calm expression, then waved her arms like she had a baton in hand and spoke up.
``So...?@k@vS14/09/220900065. Did you bring what was asked of you?``
``Yeah, right here.``
After hearing that, Takano silently signaled a nearby squad member with her chin. He quickly approached me, then roughly snatched the bag from my hands.
And then, a few people pulled out the contents and spread them out before Takano. After picking up one of the documents and looking it over, Takano turned to us once again.
``Is this everything?``

``Yes.@k@vS14/01/220100266. However, we still have copies in our possession.@k@vS14/01/220100267. Actually, the negatives are in there, but the developed photos haven't been disposed of yet.@k@vS14/01/220100268. Although, I haven't seen the contents myself.``
``What?! You son of a bitch!!``
``...Stop it.``
One of the soldiers suddenly tried to approach me, but immediately stopped after noticing Takano's sharp glare.
``Oh dear, I asked for everything though... Isn't that a breach of our agreement?@k@vS14/09/220900069. Oh, what to do?``
``Think back.@k@vS14/01/220100270. You never said anything about developing the film or making copies.``
I checked the coach's message over and over again, so I'm sure I'm not mistaken.

``Plus, we had no guarantee that Satoko and I would get out of this safely.@k@vS14/01/220100272. So of course we'd need insurance for that.@k@vS14/01/220100273. If we don't make it back in time, all that material will be passed on to Inspector Akasaka of MPD Public Security.``
``But, if you allow us to return safely, I promise to incinerate everything.``
``...I can't trust that.@k@vS14/09/220900071. What guarantee is there that you'll honor that promise?``

``Don't confuse us with you all.@k@vS14/01/VT4Bc_keiichi1095. All I care about is getting Satoko safely out of here.@k@vS14/01/VT4Bc_keiichi1096. I don't care about your organization or what you plan to do with that material.``
``Hee hee... Fine.@k@vS14/09/220900073. I'll return the girl.@k@vS14/09/220900074. Go ahead, Satoko-chan.``
Satoko stood up as soon as she heard that, then ran down the steps of the shrine toward us. And then, she jumped into Rika-chan's chest and started crying.
``Satoko... are you hurt?``
``R-Rika...!@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1041. Why did you come here...?!@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1041a. I... I put in so much effort to...!``
``I'm sorry for wasting all your hard work.@k@vS14/05/220500282. But I don't want to be the sort of person who forsakes my precious friends.``
``Rika... Uu, gh...!``
Satoko began sobbing. Looking at that, Rika-chan gently stroked her head to comfort her.
``...All right then, enough of this sob story.@k@vS14/09/220900076. Come, Rika Furude.``
With a cold smile and a gesture of her chin, Takano beckoned her over. Rika-chan glared at her, then brought Satoko to me, and slowly tried to step forward.
However.
``...So?@k@vS14/01/220100278. When can we get going?``

I quickly held my arm in front of Rika-chan to stop her, then turned back to Takano with a relaxed expression. As expected, Takano looked confused and then frowned, making no effort to hide her suspicion.
``K-Keiichi...?``
``I'm not sure I understand what you mean.@k@vS14/09/220900078. What are you trying to say, Maebara-kun?``
``The message said to ``bring`` Rika-chan here.@k@vS14/01/220100280. So I brought her here. But it didn't say anything about handing her over to you.@k@vS14/01/220100281. Isn't that right?``
``You bastard...!@k@vS14/00/hiba0111012. Enough! Quit messing around!!``

``I'm not messing around. I'm completely serious.@k@vS14/01/220100283. That was the deal, wasn't it?@k@vS14/01/220100284. You never said to hand her over, so according to our agreement I have no obligation to do so.``
``If you're unsatisfied with that, then I'll listen to your conditions again.@k@vS14/01/220100286. But I'm taking the two of them home.``
``Hey,@k@vS14/09/220900080. do you really think that childlike logic is going to work here?``

``If childlike logic is no good, let's try some adult logic.@k@vS14/01/220100288. We have enough evidence back at headquarters to shut down all of your support lines.@k@vS14/01/220100289. Even if you kill us here, it'll be the end of you. It's suicide.``
``Although, it might be nice to get a taste of the hell Napoleon faced during the scorched earth strategy in Russia.``
``Y-you son of a bitch...!!``

``Unfortunately, I can't accept that request.@k@vS14/09/220900082. You only have two options here.@k@vS14/09/220900083. One person dies, or three people die.@k@vS14/09/220900084. ...Which will it be?``
``Then... negotiations are over!!``
I quickly pulled out the thing I had kept hidden in my pocket, and pulled the safety pin without hesitation.
Yes, because this round object was... a gift from Akane-san. A hand grenade!!
``There's no sense coming to a place like this unprepaaared!!``
I tossed it at Takano as I screamed that.
The sound of hard metal striking stone rang out, then it clattered as it rolled.
The moment they noticed that familiar-looking dark green object, the soldiers around us all took cover or lay on the ground and covered their heads.
...All right, now's our chance!!
As I thought that, I turned around and beckoned Rika-chan and Satoko to run. That moment...!!

I heard a hard sound coming from the stone pavement in front of me, and small pieces began to scatter. Looking back, Takano was standing with her foot on the grenade I threw, and holding a handgun with a completely unchanged facial expression.
``M-Major?!``
``You fools... stand up already!``
``B-but!``
``I said stand!!@k@vS14/09/220900087. And you three, don't move a muscle!!``
On that shout, everyone stopped moving. With Takano glaring us down, even the tiniest move would result in us getting shot.
Time ticked down for a while longer, but there was no sign of activity from the grenade under Takano's foot... The soldiers finally understood everything and rose to their feet.
``Hee hee hee...!@k@vS14/09/220900089. That was a pretty clever stunt for a bluff...!``
``...So you realized.@k@vS14/01/220100294. It's the real deal, but the fuse has been pulled out.``
Takano responded with a boisterous laugh.

``Whether it's real or not, it's the same to me either way.@k@vS14/09/220900091. It doesn't even have value as a gamble.@k@vS14/09/220900092. All this time... I've been in a one-on-one fight with fate.@k@vS14/09/220900093. There's no way something so minuscule could crush my will.``
``...Even if this thing were real and it blew my leg off!``
``How pathetically misguided!@k@vS14/09/220900096. You think your piddling power can change the fate I bet my life to create by forceeeeeeee?!``
``Keiichi!``
``Keiichi-san!``
Something hard and sharp pierced the air and flew past the left side of my temple.

For the first time, I felt the air quake at the sound of gunfire. ...And just a moment later, I sensed the startling and terrifying sensation of being faced with a weapon that could easily take my life, slowly rising up.

Upon witnessing that overwhelming malice that couldn't be overcome with strength or willpower... my heart which had been burning hot froze in an instant. I couldn't move or put any power into my limbs.
``Hee hee... I missed on purpose. You understand that, right?@k@vS14/09/220900098. ...I'll say it again. Hand over Rika Furude.``
``No further discussion is necessary. Got it...?``
``Keiichi...!``
Rika-chan gazed at me, then shook her head with a stern expression. ...Looking at that, I gave her a nod with my eyes, then turned to Takano while clenching my fists.
``Understood.@k@vS14/01/220100298. ...Then let me go now.@k@vS14/01/220100299. Rika-chan... Sorry.``
``It's okay.@k@vS14/05/220500287. You deserve the Fighting Spirit Award just for coming this far... Nipah~.``
``K-Keiichi-san...!``
As Rika-chan began slowly walking away, Satoko reached a hand out to stop her.
But, after seeing the look on Rika-chan's face... she hardened her expression, then turned her gaze downward and shut her mouth.
``Satoko, you're a good girl.``
``...Takano, is this enough?``
Rika-chan stopped three steps before reaching Takano, then glared at her in a resolute stance. Takano played it off with a relaxed smile, then deliberately bowed with one hand on her chest.
``Welcome to the ritual stage... oh, ancient princess.@k@vS14/09/220900101. Hee hee hee...!``
``With that, we've kept all our promises.@k@vS14/05/220500291. ...So let Keiichi and Satoko go.``
``Before that, let me tell you a little something.@k@vS14/09/220900103. ...Okonogi and his team have started fighting just now.``
``...Against your detached forces.``
``What the hell!@k@vS14/03/220300211. Why are there so many people packed on a small path even the locals don't know about~?!``
Mion cursed toward Kasai beside her holding a shotgun, while they both hid behind an abandoned car with flat tires.
Kasai kept his hands busy while carefully watching the enemy's movements from the shadows, then answered her.

``...The enemy was able to get a read on us.@k@vS14/15/2215000013. If we were to go for a frontal assault, it would put the lives of the hostages in danger, so we had to use Rika-san as a decoy and attack from the rear...@k@vS14/15/2215000014. It's not hard to imagine seasoned enemies could predict this.``
``Still, to think they'd blockade the road so thoroughly...!@k@vS14/02/220200103. And they even spread caltrops across the road. They're so incredibly prepared~!``
``Gh... Why didn't we think of this...?!``
Mion felt deep regret as she heard Rena say that.
Their enemies had blocked the road with oversized pieces of garbage and filled it with sharp metal spikes, rendering car tires useless.
...They hadn't seen anything like this since the dam opposition movement five years ago.
They intended to ambush Takano from behind to support Keiichi and the others, but thanks to this the secret path they planned to take to the shrine was largely out of reach.
And what's more, the enemy was clearly aiming to waste their time.
There were no signs of an attack here, and the intent seemed to be just to pin them down.
They thought this would be the best route to bring in a large number of people... but the plan completely fell apart.
``If we're stuck like this, then Keiichi-kun and the others will...!@k@vS14/02/220200105. Mii-chan, is there no other way?!``
``There's something, but it's an even bigger detour from here.@k@vS14/03/220300214. And it's not so much a road as it is a narrow gap between trees and shrubs...``
``Shit! Even though we lost our footing here, we're just getting slower and slower!!``
She slammed her fist into the ground. Blood spread because her wound hadn't completely healed yet, but her frustration was beyond control.

``No matter how hard Kei-chan tries, there's no way he'll pull through with nothing but a dead grenade...!@k@vS14/03/220300217. Even if he leaves Rika-chan behind, they'll kill her unless we hurry...!``
``Aah, I wish I had the brains to come up with better ideas!!``
``Of course!@k@vS14/03/220300220. Don't say something so obvious, Rena!!``
``Huh? Huh?@k@vS14/02/220200107. R-Rena didn't say anything...?``
...That time, Mion and Rena both heard it. But when Mion came back to her senses, she shouted at the voice.

``D-don't say something so stupid!@k@vS14/03/220300225. That's the opposite direction of the Furude Shrine, isn't it?!@k@vS14/03/220300226. That's far more than a detour! Do you want them to get killed?!``
``...Mii-chan, Mii-chan...?``
``What?!``
``I've been worried about this for a little while, but...@k@vS14/02/220200111. why are the soldiers over there wearing strange masks on their faces?``
``Strange masks...?``
She squinted her eyes. Unlike Rena who had good long-distance vision, Mion couldn't quite make out the faces of the enemies in this dusky lighting.
At best, she could tell that a soldier was holding something over his shoulder and pointing it this way... Wait, his shoulder?!
``No way, is that an RPG?!``
``Everyone, take cover!``
``Th-then...?``

``Terribly sorry.@k@vS14/09/220900106. ...I'm sure you were planning to feign leaving quietly, then try to catch me off guard and take her back...@k@vS14/09/220900107. But I was prepared for this.@k@vS14/09/220900108. Hee hee hee...!``
Oh no. I guess she already saw through our plan...!

``But I do believe your plan was pretty well-thought-out.@k@vS14/09/220900110. Maybe I can show you something nice as a consolation prize for your effort.@k@vS14/09/220900111. Rika-chan, are you interested to know what happens in the village after you die...?``
``...The emergency manual will be activated, right?@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1198_2. The villagers will be evacuated and gathered together under the false pretense of a natural disaster...``
``Oh my... You're well informed.@k@vS14/09/220900113. Did you hear that from Director Irie?``
``Sorry, but... things aren't going to play out the way you imagined.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1198_4. By now, the villagers should have already heard everything about this conspiracy.``
``So even if I die, they'll never let you order them around through fear of the curse.``
``...What do you mean?``
``Even if you activate the emergency manual, most of the villagers will manage to escape before you can ``silence`` them.``

``And if the survivors' symptoms worsen 48 hours later and cause a major incident, it'll turn into a liability issue for the higher-ups at ``Tokyo`` and the ``Mountain Dogs`` who were supposed to be handling it.``
``So as a result, the primary source of your research project will disappear.``
``On the other hand, if nothing happens to the villagers after 48 hours have passed... then all the Hinamizawa Syndrome research you so passionately studied would lose all substance.``
``Either way, you're finished.@k@vS14/01/220100307. It's not even necessary for Public Security to get involved.``
``I see. So things have changed in that way.``
Takano quietly looked down as she listened to that. ...In reality, Public Security was already taking action, so Takano and her cohorts were already finished...
``...Hee... hee... hee hee...!@k@vS14/09/220900117. Ahahahahahahahahahahaha!!!``
All of a sudden.
Takano laughed like she had gone mad, and turned her terrifying eyes this way as if to mock us.
Then, after her crazed laughter, she brushed her tousled hair back, took something out from behind her back, and then attached it to her handgun.

``Delightful...!@k@vS14/09/220900119. Yes, absolutely delightful!!@k@vS14/09/220900120. I'd thought all my predictions were right and that my thorough preparations had been put to good use, but this is so, so hilarious I could die laughing!!``
``Wh-what...?``
``Hahahahahaha! I've already known that for a long time!``
Then Takano roared out, sternly holding her gun high to the sky.

``I heard it from the client.... not that long ago.@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1025. It's pointless even if the tragedy occurs... Whether the emergency manual is activated or not, the Alphabet Project and the research into Hinamizawa Syndrome are over!``
``The opposition party I was trying to get rid of created a scandal without my knowledge and lost their power long ago!@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1027. ...And what do you think happened as a result?``
``The upper ranks of the Alphabet Project have been hijacked by new leadership at the client!``
``And they abandoned their support... They canceled their heartfelt invitation to continue my Hinamizawa Syndrome research!!``

``Because even before I caused a major incident, they were already able to seize power with little effort!!@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1031. In other words... the people instigating me were fighting a power struggle from the start!!``
``Ahahahahaha... Aaahahahahahaha!!!``
``Takano...!``
``Yes... that's right. I'm nothing but a clown! The tail of the lizard!!``

``They were simply using me while it was convenient for them, and when I was no longer necessary they cut me off in a heartbeat!@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1035. And I knew from the beginning that was the sort of people they were!!``
``...But even so, I won't let myself be swung around by their whims anymore!!``
``Taking advantage of me and trampling on me... Selfishly enjoying the harvest of the world. I'll not allow them to do this even if I die!!``
``If I'm going to be destroyed either way... then why not take them down with me!?!``
``Hehehehe... Aahahahahahahaha!!!``
``N-no way...!@k@vS14/01/VT4Bc_keiichi1102. Then this has no meaning...``
``...Don't move!!``
Just as I was about to take a step forward, Takano's rage-filled roar held me back.
The darkness in her eyes swallowed everything I could see. ...A chill ran down my spine when her despondent, horribly menacing eyes crossed with mine.
``I'll tell you something good... Why do you think I called you here at this particular time?@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1042. It's because I wouldn't be able to use this in broad daylight.``
``A signal flare for Yagouchi!``
``I never thought I'd have to use it, but as they say, well prepared means no worries... Hee hee hee!``
``Wh-what are you trying to do?!``
``...Rika-chan, do you remember?@k@vS14/09/220900128. The ``H173`` anti-vaccine, capable of raising mildly infected people's symptoms to L5 in an instant.``
``I've been studying it all this time... and recently managed to complete an improved version.``
``A brand-new virus, capable of airborne infection... ``H173-02!````
Rika-chan's face hardened and turned pale in shock and awe. Takano laughed while gleefully watching that, then continued.
``Did you know?@k@vS14/09/220900132. Yagouchi is upwind of Hinamizawa.``
``So it's the best location for a pesticide spraying helicopter to start from.``

``And when it's scattered by the wind and falls to the ground... the villagers will suffer and cry, then transform into hellish visages of death and destruction!!@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1045. ...Aahahahahahahahaha!!``
``...N-no way... Seriously?!``
``The police, and all of your friends... are gathered here in the village, intently focused on either this shrine or the clinic.``
``And nobody will give a helicopter flying about a second thought.@k@vS14/09/220900137. Nobody can stop it...!@k@vS14/09/220900138. Ahahahahahaha, ahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!!``
``P-please, stop!!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1201. If you do that, all the people of the village will...!!``
``...It's over.@k@vS14/09/220900140. No, maybe this is the beginning.@k@vS14/09/220900141. This is a solemn ``ritual.`` A sacrifice to the gods...!``
``Stoooop...!!!``
Devoid of any heart.
Right before our eyes, Takano fired the signal, which burst at high altitude into a red firework-like pattern.
As if...
A bloodstained flower had just bloomed.
It was distorted.
Ugly.
And... it had drawn out a cruel pattern.
``...Ah... aah......!@k@vS14/05/220500303. Aaah... aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaahhh...!!!!``
Rika-chan's scream echoed all around.
And then.
Upon witnessing that, Takano let out a laugh with an expression on her face that could no longer be described as anything but demonic.
``Ahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!``
``Yes, that's it!!@k@vS14/09/220900144. That face, that pain, that despair!!``
``That's what I wanted to see! What I wanted to hear!@k@vS14/09/220900146. Your hateful, prideful face warping as you fall apart!!!@k@vS14/09/220900147. Ahahahahahahahaha!!``
``So, are you frustrated?@k@vS14/09/220900149. Do you hate me?@k@vS14/09/220900150. Do you want to kill me?@k@vS14/09/220900151. Ahahahahahahahahahaha!!``
``Sorry, but there's nothing you can do about it!!@k@vS14/09/220900153. You can just watch from there, cursing your stupidity and helplessness while struggling and suffering until you die!!``
``That is your fate. I've invited you to the ultimate stage at the ultimate rituaaaaal!!@k@vS14/09/220900155. Aaahahahahahahahahhahahahhah!!!``
``T-Takano...!@k@vS14/01/220100312. You... You're insaaaane!!!``
I let my excitement get the better of me and jumped at Takano.
But, I was immediately blocked and surrounded by her soldiers, then knocked to the ground by a fierce blow.
``...You guys did your best.@k@vS14/09/220900157. So as a reward, I'll kill you now so you won't have to suffer...@k@vS14/09/220900158. Maybe I'll start with you first, Keiichi Maebara-kun...?``
Then, Takano let out an arrogant laugh as she removed the flare adapter from her gun and slipped in the regular ammunition.
``...Farewell, Maebara-kun.@k@vS14/09/220900160. I enjoyed your youthful spirit, but the world is far too dark and cruel for that.``
Takano raised her pistol as she said that. And then, without any hesitation, she pulled the trigger.
